title: Onigashima Moves Toward the Climax
description: On pages 21–24, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Hm? What's this aroma?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Whoops I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What? Got food poison- ing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: It was so delicious she fainted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: This scent ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Is it lemon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You got it, miss!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I put lemon zest in the dough when I rolled the noodles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It adds a refreshing elegance to contrast with the rich scallops, black pepper, and drizzle of chicken oil on top.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Lemon?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You tryin' to disrespect SOBA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The broth too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: It has such a deep, complex flavor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I've never tasted broth like this before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My broth starts with a Hongash/ sauce, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Then I added Scallop Liquid...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and filled it out with chicken stock and aromatics for my own take on 70R/PA/TAN chicken broth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Wait. Those are all average ingredients.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What's special about that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoops! I almost forgot the star of my own dish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The true key- stone to my broth ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: ...is this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Kolk fish?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's huge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me that's a Koi fish from the waterfall at the entrance to Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You caught one of those?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep, that's right! With some help from franchise and honeyichi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Koi can be a high- quality ingredient if you use it right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you remove the excess odor, with proper shimofuri technique, you can get excellent stock out of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: It's perfect for a Noodle- soup base.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Heh. Foolish boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You don't understand a thing about SOBA.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The more unnecessary flavors you slap into that bowl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the more you Blot out the most important one of all- the SOBA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you're using that connection to challenge me?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
